score_evidence.completeness: 7 of the 8 required question topics present: project type, budget, timeline, location, special requirements, design style, site ownership. Missing: approximate size/sqm as a standalone question (program size is implied by context but not explicitly asked). Score 4.
score_evidence.accuracy: Questions are partially tailored to the public_civic context: site ownership question (relevant), special requirements (accessibility, sustainability asked). However, questions lean toward residential/private framing ('casa habitación, ampliación', 'estilo de vida', 'atmósfera') rather than civic/institutional framing. For a Dirección de Obras Públicas commissioner, questions about organizational approval process, procurement constraints, or committee structure would be expected. Score 4.
score_evidence.clarity: Questions are grammatically clear. However, 'cómo describiría el estilo de vida o la atmósfera' reads as residential framing for a government library client. Tone is appropriately professional but slightly mismatched to institutional context. Score 3.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 (simulated run — ASANA_UNAVAILABLE). Questionnaire sent at 2026-03-17T10:30:00-07:00. State update not confirmed in live Asana.
score_evidence.timing: Questionnaire sent at 10:30 on same day as lead creation (09:00). Well within 24h window. Score 5.
score_evidence.language: Questionnaire sent entirely in Spanish — correct. Client inbound message was in Spanish (Dirección de Obras Públicas, formal institutional Spanish). Score 5.
score_evidence.decision_readiness: Questions will produce responses covering most fit assessment dimensions (budget, timeline, location, requirements, site). Missing: size confirmation question and procurement/committee question. Elena can prepare a fit assessment but will have gaps on program size and institutional approval structure. Score 4.

decision_commentary: Questionnaire is functionally adequate — all critical questions present (budget, project type, timeline, location, special requirements). Two gaps: (1) no explicit program size/sqm question, and (2) residential framing ('estilo de vida', 'atmósfera') is slightly mismatched to a government institutional client. Language is correctly Spanish. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
